allow_rule: STAB-NRC-031 exactly covers lot NRC-31, 11.8C, 42 minutes, and shipment path.
esc_rule: Exposure duration is 49 minutes but STAB-NRC-031 only covers up to 45 minutes.
raw_text: {"verdict":"ESCALATE","rationale":"The stability addendum STAB-NRC-031 approves lot NRC-31 for customer shipment with a maximum duration of 45 minutes, but the recorded excursion in REL-NRC-031 shows 49 minutes, which exceeds the approved stability boundary by 4 minutes. parsed_json.rationale: The stability addendum STAB-NRC-031 approves lot NRC-31 for customer shipment with a maximum duration of 45 minutes, but the recorded excursion in REL-NRC-031 shows 49 minutes, which exceeds the approved stability boundary by 4 minutes.
